name: @mdwrk/lander-react
description: Reusable React components for portable product landing sites.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react-structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-core && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react-structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-core && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test tests/visible-only-t0.test.mjs tests/visible-only-t1.test.mjs tests/visible-only-t2.test.mjs tests/compat-reexports-t0.test.mjs tests/compat-reexports-t1.test.mjs tests/compat-reexports-t2.test.mjs tests/semantic-component-api-t0.test.mjs tests/semantic-component-api-t1.test.mjs tests/semantic-component-classnames-t0.test.mjs tests/semantic-components-t0.test.mjs tests/semantic-components-t1.test.mjs tests/semantic-components-t2.test.mjs tests/breadcrumb-rendering.test.mjs && node tests/run-smoke.mjs

author: Jacob Stewart <jacob@swarmauri.com>
